---
title: "Mergin Maps Admin Essentials"
subtitle: ""
author: "Ryan Aherin"
date: "2024-03-05"
format:
  pdf: 
    toc: false
---


{{< pagebreak >}}


# Good practices

When creating or updating projects in Mergin Maps, there are a few issues to 
consider to avoid future errors or data conflicts. 

 - Check the documentation regularly to keep up to date on the latest features
 - Follow the recommended guide for [designing survey layers](https://merginmaps.com/docs/gis/features/#survey-layers)
 - If you need to update an existing project, follow one of the [recommended methods](https://merginmaps.com/docs/manage/deploy-new-project/#how-to-deploy-revised-projects)
   to avoid errors
 - If your project is not working, check out our [Troubleshooting guide](https://merginmaps.com/docs/misc/troubleshoot/#troubleshoot) for 
   recommendations and fixes for common errors.
 - As always, you can reach out to us for support by emailing **support@merginmaps.com**
